mapper.select: SELECT id, field_name, major_name, minor_name, color, understanding FROM subjects ORDER BY field_name, major_name, minor_name
mapper.update: MERGE INTO subjects (field_name, major_name, minor_name, color, understanding) KEY (field_name, major_name, minor_name) VALUES (#{fieldName}, #{majorName}, #{minorName}, #{color}, 0)
